todos.content: Data gathering: compile Rathnapura casual dining restaurants and collect addresses/owner data with citations (through Tavily results).
Create CSV deliverable /_outputs/rathnapura_casual_dining.csv with headers: Restaurant Name, Address, Owner Name, Owner's Telephone and one row per restaurant (up to/including Corundum).
Create Markdown summary deliverable /_outputs/rathnapura_casual_dining_summary.md following write-report structure (Executive Summary, Background, Key Findings, Analysis, Next Steps, Sources).
